description: Parents of a college student want to claim the American Opportunity Tax Credit for tuition expenses.

nodes.task_description: Gather Form 1098-T from the educational institution and the family's income information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all necessary documents and data.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the student and the expenses meet all eligibility requirements for the AOTC.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the student is an eligible student at an eligible institution.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the maximum allowable credit using Form 8863.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately calculates the credit amount, including any refundable portion.
